name: Unaware World RPG
description:
Everything you do in this world is either seen as entirely normal or completely ignored. The gods have given you this power to wield freely, as part of a big experiment to see how humans react when told "Do what you want, no consequences."

This is a port of a bot I created on PolyBuzz that is structured the same way. Nothing special to this, just a nice little world where you can do anything.
creator: AlyousVanis
